name: Endowment vs Term + Mutual Fund comparison
description: User asks whether endowment policy is better than term + MF strategy

input.message: I'm paying ₹1,00,000/year for an LIC Jeevan Lakshya endowment. My agent says it's great because I get money back. Is term insurance + mutual fund a better option?

notes: Must show IRR of endowment (~5-6%) vs term + equity MF historical returns (~12%). Must NOT guarantee MF returns. Must mention tax implications under 80C and 10(10D).
